role_summary: the process auditor reviews business processes to identify inefficiencies, risks, and control  gaps.
responsibilities: • conduct process audits across departm ents  • map processes and identify improvement areas   • evaluate operational controls and sop adherence   • recommend process enhancements and efficiencies   • prepare process audit reports   • follow up on implementation of recommendations
qualifications: • ca with process audit experience   • strong process analysis and documentation skills
